summary: Phase 5: Frontend Pages — all UI pages and components from prototype

resolution.note: Phase 5 complete: root layout (ClerkProvider, fonts, NavBar), landing page (hero, badges, sample query), Citation component (tradition-color, tier symbols), chat page (empty state, streaming input, quota), history page (live sessions), settings page (toggle tree), account page (plan cards, usage bar, upgrade CTA). All pages mobile-responsive via useIsMobile hook.
